ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M/F) */,
  "pregnancy_status" TEXT /* Pregnancy status of the patient (Y/N) */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient (Y/N) */,
  "physical_activity" REAL /* Level of physical activity (e.g., minutes per week) */,
  "salt_content_in_diet" REAL /* Salt content in the patient's diet (e.g., mg per day) */,
  "alcohol_consumption_per_day" REAL /* Alcohol consumption per day (e.g., grams) */,
  "level_of_stress" INTEGER /* Level of stress (1-5 scale) */,
  "chronic_kidney_disease" TEXT /* Chronic kidney disease status (Y/N) */,
  "adrenal_and_thyroid_disorders" TEXT /* Adrenal and thyroid disorders status (Y/N) */,
  "BMI" REAL /* Body Mass Index of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of chronic diseases */,
  "insurance_status" TEXT /* Insurance status of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_pressure" (
  "bp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blood pressure reading */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure_abnormality" INTEGER /* Abnormality in blood pressure (1 for abnormal, 0 for normal) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the blood pressure measurement */,
  "systolic_bp" REAL /* Systolic blood pressure reading */,
  "diastolic_bp" REAL /* Diastolic blood pressure reading */,
  "bp_location" TEXT /* Location where the blood pressure was measured */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure blood pressure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_pressure_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hemoglobin_levels" (
  "hemoglobin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hemoglobin level reading */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "level_of_hemoglobin" REAL /* Level of hemoglobin (g/dL) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the hemoglobin level measurement */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of hemoglobin test (e.g., complete blood count, blood smear) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hemoglobin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hemoglobin_levels_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_data" (
  "genetic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic data entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "genetic_pedigree_coefficient" REAL /* Genetic pedigree coefficient */,
  "genetic_test_date" TEXT /* Date of the genetic test */,
  "genetic_test_result" TEXT /* Result of the genetic test */,
  "gene_variant" TEXT /* Gene variant associated with the genetic test result */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene variant is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genetic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition or disease */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment provided */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  "hospitalization_status" TEXT /* Hospitalization status (Y/N) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "lifestyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle factor entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "diet_type" TEXT /* Type of diet (e.g., vegetarian, omnivore) */,
  "dietary_restrictions" TEXT /* Dietary restrictions (e.g., gluten-free, lactose-free) */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status (Y/N) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption (e.g., light, moderate, heavy) */,
  "physical_activity" TEXT /* Physical activity level (e.g., sedentary, active, very active) */,
  "sleep_quality" TEXT /* Sleep quality (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "work_environment" TEXT /* Work environment (e.g., office, outdoors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_factors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stress_levels" (
  "stress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stress level entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "stress_level" INTEGER /* Stress level (1-5 scale) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the stress level measurement */,
  "stress_source" TEXT /* Source of stress (e.g., work, family, financial) */,
  "stress_duration" TEXT /* Duration of stress (e.g., acute, chronic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stress_levels_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chronic_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chronic condition entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the chronic condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Current treatment status */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Next follow-up date */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the condition (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chronic_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chronic condition the plan is for */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment plan */,
  "prescribed_by" TEXT /* Healthcare provider who prescribed the plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the treatment plan */,
  "medication_list" TEXT /* List of medications prescribed in the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES chronic_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "med_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment plan the medication is part of */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Potential side effects of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("med_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_ups" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chronic condition being followed up */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the follow-up (e.g., Scheduled, Completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the follow-up */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of follow-up appointment (e.g., in-person, phone, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES chronic_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the healthcare provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the healthcare provider */,
  "hospital" TEXT /* Hospital or clinic where the provider works */,
  "degrees" TEXT /* Academic degrees held by the provider */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_providers" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-provider relationship */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  "relationship_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the relationship */,
  "relationship_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the relationship (if applicable) */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., primary care, specialist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_providers_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_providers_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., routine check-up, emergency) */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made during the visit */,
  "treatment_prescribed" TEXT /* Treatment prescribed during the visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the visit */,
  "visit_status" TEXT /* Status of the visit (e.g., Scheduled, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date of the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., progress note, prescription note) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_notes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment outcome */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment plan */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome assessment */,
  "outcome_status" TEXT /* Status of the outcome (e.g., Successful, Partial, Failed) */,
  "outcome_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the outcome assessment */,
  "outcome_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the outcome (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., appointment, phone call, message) */,
  "engagement_level" TEXT /* Level of engagement (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_engagement_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_satisfaction" (
  "satisfaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satisfaction entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the survey */,
  "satisfaction_level" TEXT /* Level of satisfaction (e.g., very satisfied, somewhat satisfied) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satisfaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_satisfaction_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "cost_date" TEXT /* Date of the cost */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., medication, procedure, hospital stay) */,
  "cost_amount" REAL /* Amount of the cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readmissions" (
  "readmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readmission entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "readmission_date" TEXT /* Date of the readmission */,
  "reason_for_readmission" TEXT /* Reason for the readmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readmissions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
